title: 'I wasn’t making it easy for them': Trump recounts tense moments after shots were fired during White House dinner
summary_full: Gunfire erupted at a Washington hotel during a gala attended by President Donald Trump. Secret Service agents swiftly evacuated the President after a suspect opened fire. Trump described the incident, stating he was not worried but curious. The suspect was apprehended. Questions are now being raised about security protocols at the venue.
